summary: Iteration 3 testing — A/B exit-intent popup + /api/events tracking. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases pass (7 new events tests + 9 leads regression). Frontend: A/B variants work end-to-end — variant assignment stable in localStorage, no form testids leak, exit_view fires on open, exit_click fires on CTA, Variant A opens Calendly, Variant B opens wa.me with 'Checklist' prefilled text, decline/X both persist am_exit_popup_v2. Regression OK: WhatsApp float at bottom-24, slots-counter present, Ver Cómo Funciona opens video modal, SEO title/desc present, no console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: ExitIntentPopup.jsx: fireEvent uses fire-and-forget axios.post without await and without .catch on the returned promise — unhandled rejections may show up in browser console for ad-blocked clients. Consider chaining .catch(()=>{}) on axios.post.
ExitIntentPopup.jsx: getOrAssignVariant runs inside useMemo with [] deps which is fine, but localStorage access on SSR is technically guarded only by try/catch; OK for CRA but worth keeping in mind.

/api/events/stats has no auth — acceptable for public A/B stats, but consider rate limiting or excluding bots, and capping aggregate window (e.g., last 30d) when traffic grows. Currently scans all events.
Event model accepts arbitrary metadata dict — no size cap. Consider max payload size or whitelist of metadata keys to prevent abuse.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth required for this iteration
seed_data_creation: Test events inserted with variants 'A', 'B', and 'ZTEST' for assertions; TEST_-prefixed leads from prior iteration regression
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/events accepts {name (min_length=1, required), variant (optional), metadata (optional dict)} -> 201 with id+created_at. /api/events/stats aggregates by {variant, name} and adds cr_percent = round(clicks/views*100, 2). To force a variant in playwright before reload: localStorage.setItem('am_ab_variant_v1','A'|'B'); localStorage.removeItem('am_exit_popup_v2'); then dispatch mouseout with clientY:0 relatedTarget:null on document. wa.me URLs redirect to api.whatsapp.com/send — check decoded text for 'Checklist' rather than asserting host. Verified: data-variant attr present on root popup div, no form-related testids present anywhere in DOM, exit_view fires exactly once per open (guarded by viewFiredRef).
rca of the issue: No issues found. All acceptance criteria from the iter-3 spec verified.
